'''ât-d-z''' ('''katadaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yok|yok]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-d-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yok|yok]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-d-z
|-
! Lemma
| katadaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitadaz|thitadaz]] || [[word:jitadaz|jitadaz]] || [[word:shitadaz|shitadaz]] || [[word:kitadaz|kitadaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutadaz|thuthutadaz]] || [[word:jujutadaz|jujutadaz]] || [[word:shushutadaz|shushutadaz]] || [[word:kukutadaz|kukutadaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutadaz|thutadaz]] || [[word:jutadaz|jutadaz]] || [[word:shutadaz|shutadaz]] || [[word:kutadaz|kutadaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutadaz|thutadaz]] || [[word:jutadaz|jutadaz]] || [[word:shutadaz|shutadaz]] || [[word:kutadaz|kutadaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetadaz|thetadaz]] || [[word:jetadaz|jetadaz]] || [[word:shetadaz|shetadaz]] || [[word:ketadaz|ketadaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotadaz|thothotadaz]] || [[word:jojotadaz|jojotadaz]] || [[word:shoshotadaz|shoshotadaz]] || [[word:kokotadaz|kokotadaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotadaz|thotadaz]] || [[word:jotadaz|jotadaz]] || [[word:shotadaz|shotadaz]] || [[word:kotadaz|kotadaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotadaz|thotadaz]] || [[word:jotadaz|jotadaz]] || [[word:shotadaz|shotadaz]] || [[word:kotadaz|kotadaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtadaz|thĂŠtadaz]] || [[word:jĂŠtadaz|jĂŠtadaz]] || [[word:shĂŠtadaz|shĂŠtadaz]] || [[word:kĂŠtadaz|kĂŠtadaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatadaz|thathatadaz]] || [[word:jajatadaz|jajatadaz]] || [[word:shashatadaz|shashatadaz]] || [[word:kakatadaz|kakatadaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatadaz|thatadaz]] || [[word:jatadaz|jatadaz]] || [[word:shatadaz|shatadaz]] || [[word:katadaz|katadaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatadaz|thatadaz]] || [[word:jatadaz|jatadaz]] || [[word:shatadaz|shatadaz]] || [[word:katadaz|katadaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatadaz|shatadaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatadaz|goshatadaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatadaz|gokishatadaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatadaznĂŒ|shatadaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatadaznknĂŒ|goshatadaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadaznĂŒ|gokishatadaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatadazshĂ«|shatadazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatadaznkshĂ«|goshatadaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatadazshĂ«|gokishatadazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadazro|shatadazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadaznkro|goshatadaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadazro|gokishatadazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadazmu|shatadazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadaznkmu|goshatadaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadazmu|gokishatadazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatadazsher|shatadazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatadaznksher|goshatadaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatadazsher|gokishatadazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatadazng|shatadazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatadaznkng|goshatadaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatadazng|gokishatadazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatadazya|shatadazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatadaznkya|goshatadaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatadazya|gokishatadazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatadazyam|shatadazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatadaznkyam|goshatadaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatadazyam|gokishatadazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatadaznĂŒshĂ«|shatadaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatadaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshatadaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatadaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishatadaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadaznĂŒro|shatadaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadaznknĂŒro|goshatadaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadaznĂŒro|gokishatadaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadaznĂŒmu|shatadaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadaznknĂŒmu|goshatadaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadaznĂŒmu|gokishatadaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatadazshĂ«nĂŒ|shatadazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatadaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatadaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatadazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadazshĂ«ro|shatadazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadaznkshĂ«ro|goshatadaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadazshĂ«ro|gokishatadazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadazshĂ«mu|shatadazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadaznkshĂ«mu|goshatadaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadazshĂ«mu|gokishatadazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatadazronĂŒ|shatadazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatadaznkronĂŒ|goshatadaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadazronĂŒ|gokishatadazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatadazroshĂ«|shatadazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatadaznkroshĂ«|goshatadaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatadazroshĂ«|gokishatadazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadazromu|shatadazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadaznkromu|goshatadaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadazromu|gokishatadazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatadazmunĂŒ|shatadazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatadaznkmunĂŒ|goshatadaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadazmunĂŒ|gokishatadazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatadazmushĂ«|shatadazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatadaznkmushĂ«|goshatadaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatadazmushĂ«|gokishatadazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadazmuro|shatadazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadaznkmuro|goshatadaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadazmuro|gokishatadazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
